markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client progress, blockers, and Rachel's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Cresta:** Scope for this week is 5 articles due to a slow review process. Rachel will provide feedback on the feedback to help Bailey guide the client's product team.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Logic:** A new content strategy is proposed: 3 new articles + 2 refreshes/week. Jen's pipeline fixes have reduced feedback, but a final quality gap remains.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**HX:** The project is paused pending client PSEO template review. Bailey will ask the client to allow auto-publishing to unblock a backlog of \~8 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Workload:** Rachel's workload is strained by intense client feedback. Jen will be engaged to diagnose and fix the Cresta pipeline, mirroring her success with Logic.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

## Topics

### Workload & Pipeline Optimization

  - [**Problem:** Rachel's workload is strained by intense feedback from Cresta, Logic, and HX, consuming hours not budgeted for and causing a feeling of "constantly playing catch-up."](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [**Solution:** Engage Jen (pipeline specialist) to diagnose and fix pipelines, starting with Cresta.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Precedent:** Jen's work on the Logic pipeline reduced editing time from hours to \~15 minutes and significantly improved output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**Goal:** Apply this success to Cresta to reduce editing time and improve article quality.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Client: Cresta

  - [**Content Strategy:** Bailey is guiding the client to prioritize articles based on AI visibility, not just search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low-volume "vs." articles are critical for product connection and should not be deprioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Review Process:** The current review process is a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
      - [**Impact:** Slows down work (e.g., 2.5 articles in 4 hours) and reduces this week's scope to 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Example:** Vague "see earlier comment" feedback is inefficient and unhelpful.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [**Action:** Rachel will provide feedback on the feedback → Bailey will use it to guide the client's product team on how to give more actionable input.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Pipeline Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [**Problem:** Competitor articles require heavy editing, suggesting a pipeline issue.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [**Action:** Rachel added the "competitor comparison guidelines" artifact to the Atlas project.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Rachel will engage Jen to diagnose the pipeline, using the new artifact to improve competitor article quality.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Problem:** Staged articles sit in the CMS for weeks before the client publishes them, delaying Looker updates.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will ask the client to either:](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
        1.  [Allow auto-publishing once an article is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
        2.  [Provide a standard image library to remove that as a blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Client: Logic

  - [**New Content Strategy:** Bailey proposed a new cadence (3 new articles + 2 refreshes/week) to Azam today.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The 2:1 ratio is conservative, assuming refreshes are full rewrites based on past experience.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**Pipeline Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
      - [**Status:** Jen's fixes have significantly improved output quality, reducing Azam's feedback from major overhauls to minor tweaks.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [**Remaining Gap:** A final quality gap exists between "functional to good" that requires further pipeline refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)

### Client: HX

  - [**Project Status:** Paused pending client review of PSEO calibration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
      - [**Goal:** Finalize the PSEO template this week, with Framer hooked up to Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Action:** Rachel will review the PSEO project to understand the content structure before publishing begins.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Complete 5 Cresta articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Provide Bailey with feedback on the Cresta review process.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [Engage Jen to diagnose and fix the Cresta pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Publish Logic articles and update the Looker report before tomorrow's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Review the HX PSEO project to understand the template.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Ask the Cresta client to allow auto-publishing or provide a standard image library.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Discuss the new content strategy (3 new + 2 refresh/week) with the Logic client.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
      - [Check in with the HX client on PSEO page review status.](https://fathom.video/share/cezf5kyj7yEHFGnV8ytyh6-qYBu7zbXi?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
